name: F. W. WOOLWORTH CO. v. CONTEMPORARY ARTS, INC.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in F. W. WOOLWORTH CO. v. CONTEMPORARY ARTS, INC. (344 U.S. 228, 1952 Term).
